docs.title: mayan-py
docs.text:
A typed Python client for the Mayan Finance API — cross-chain swaps and bridging across Solana, EVM chains and Sui (and more: Aptos, Sui, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, BNB, Avalanche, Linea, Sonic…).

The headline call: get_quote() returns the best cross-chain route — expected output, fees and ETA — across all of Mayan's protocols (MCTP, Swift, Wormhole).

  • Sync (MayanClient) and async (AsyncMayanClient) clients on top of httpx.
  • All responses parsed into pydantic v2 models with full type hints (py.typed). Models tolerate unknown fields, so they keep working as the API evolves.
  • Multi-ecosystem by design: addresses and raw amounts are strings, so Solana mints, EVM contracts and Sui types all round-trip without precision loss.
  • Status tracking with poll_swap_status() — polls a swap to a terminal (COMPLETED / REFUNDED) state with exponential backoff.

docs.title: Install
docs.text: pip install mayan-py

docs.title: Quickstart — a cross-chain quote (keyless, a few lines)
docs.text:
from mayan import MayanClient

quote = MayanClient().get_quote(
    amount="100",                                                  # 100 USDC (whole units)
    from_token="EPjFWdd5AufqSSqeM2qN1xzybapC8G4wEGGkZwyTDt1v",     # USDC (Solana)
    from_chain="solana",
    to_token="0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48",         # USDC (Ethereum)
    to_chain="ethereum",
)
print(quote.type, quote.expected_amount_out, quote.client_eta)     # MCTP 97.97 "1 min"

Pass amount_base_units="100000000" instead of amount to specify the input in the token's smallest unit. Use get_quotes(...) to get every candidate route (one per protocol) plus the minimum SDK version, rather than just the best one.

docs.title: Supported tokens
docs.text:
tokens = MayanClient().get_tokens(chain="solana")   # {"solana": [Token, ...]}
sol = next(t for t in tokens["solana"] if t.symbol == "SOL")
print(sol.mint, sol.decimals)

docs.title: Track a swap to completion
docs.text:
After you broadcast the source-chain transaction, poll its status (this hits Mayan's explorer API):

client = MayanClient()
status = client.get_swap_status(tx_hash="0x5eaa...")     # one-shot lookup
print(status.client_status, status.status)               # "COMPLETED", "REDEEMED_ON_EVM_WITH_FEE"

final = client.poll_swap_status(tx_hash="0x5eaa...")     # blocks until terminal
assert final.is_terminal                                  # is_completed or is_refunded

docs.title: Async
docs.text:
import asyncio
from mayan import AsyncMayanClient

async def main():
    async with AsyncMayanClient() as client:
        return await client.get_tokens(chain="solana")

asyncio.run(main())

The async client mirrors the sync one method-for-method.

docs.title: Configuration
docs.text:
MayanClient / AsyncMayanClient accept:

Argument Default Purpose referer "mayan-py" Required referer header; set it to identify your app. api_key None Optional API key (all endpoints work keyless). base_url https://price-api.mayan.finance Price API host (quotes, tokens). status_base_url https://explorer-api.mayan.finance Explorer API host (swap status). sdk_version "10_0_0" sdkVersion the API requires to serve quotes/tokens. timeout 30.0 Per-request timeout (seconds). max_retries 3 429 retries before raising MayanRateLimitError. http_client None Bring your own httpx.Client/AsyncClient.

docs.title: Errors
docs.text:
All library errors subclass MayanError:

  • MayanAPIError — non-2xx response (e.g. HTTP 406 ROUTE_NOT_FOUND when no route exists). Carries status_code and response_body.
  • MayanRateLimitError — HTTP 429 after retries are exhausted; carries retry_after.

docs.title: Examples
docs.text: See examples/: quote.py and async_quote_and_status.py.

docs.title: Development
docs.text:
pip install -e '.[dev]'
ruff check .
mypy
pytest                 # unit tests (live tests deselected)
pytest -m integration  # live keyless smoke test

docs.text: MIT — see LICENSE.

docs.title: RateLimit dataclass
docs.text: Snapshot of any rate-limit headers from the last response.

docs.title: AsyncMayanClient
docs.text:
Asynchronous client for the Mayan Finance API.

A coroutine-based mirror of :class:MayanClient with identical endpoints, parameters and return types. Use it as an async context manager so the underlying HTTP connections are closed on exit.

Example

import asyncio async def main(): ... async with AsyncMayanClient() as client: ... return await client.get_tokens(chain="solana") tokens = asyncio.run(main()) # doctest: +SKIP

docs.title: rate_limit property
docs.text: The most recent rate-limit snapshot, or None before any call.

docs.title: __init__(*, api_key=None, base_url=DEFAULT_BASE_URL, status_base_url=DEFAULT_STATUS_BASE_URL, api_key_header=DEFAULT_API_KEY_HEADER, referer=DEFAULT_REFERER, sdk_version=DEFAULT_SDK_VERSION, timeout=DEFAULT_TIMEOUT, max_retries=DEFAULT_MAX_RETRIES, http_client=None)
docs.text:
Create an async client.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default api_key Optional[str]

Optional Mayan API key. All endpoints work without one.

None base_url str

Price API base URL (quotes/tokens). Override for a proxy.

DEFAULT_BASE_URL status_base_url str

Explorer API base URL (swap status).

DEFAULT_STATUS_BASE_URL api_key_header str

Header name used to send api_key.

DEFAULT_API_KEY_HEADER referer str

Value sent in the required referer header on every request; set this to identify your integration.

DEFAULT_REFERER sdk_version str

sdkVersion sent with quote/token requests.

DEFAULT_SDK_VERSION timeout float

Per-request timeout in seconds.

DEFAULT_TIMEOUT max_retries int

Maximum number of 429 retries before raising :class:~mayan.exceptions.MayanRateLimitError.

DEFAULT_MAX_RETRIES http_client Optional[AsyncClient]

An existing httpx.AsyncClient to reuse. When provided it is used as-is and conflicting base_url/api_key/ api_key_header are ignored (with a warning).

None

docs.title: __aenter__() async
docs.text: Enter the async context manager; returns self.

docs.title: __aexit__(exc_type, exc, tb) async
docs.text: Exit the async context manager, closing the HTTP client.

docs.title: close() async
docs.text: Close the underlying async HTTP client and release its connections.

docs.title: MayanClient
docs.text:
Synchronous client for the Mayan Finance API.

All endpoints used here are public and keyless; an API key is optional. The client tracks any ratelimit-* response headers, pauses proactively when the quota is exhausted, and retries 429s with backoff.

Example

with MayanClient() as client: # doctest: +SKIP ... quote = client.get_quote( ... amount="100", ... from_token="EPjFWdd5AufqSSqeM2qN1xzybapC8G4wEGGkZwyTDt1v", # USDC (Solana) ... from_chain="solana", ... to_token="0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48", # USDC (Ethereum) ... to_chain="ethereum", ... ) ... quote.expected_amount_out

docs.title: rate_limit property
docs.text: The most recent rate-limit snapshot, or None before any call.

DEFAULT_STATUS_BASE_URL api_key_header str

Value sent in the required referer header on every request; set this to identify your integration.

DEFAULT_REFERER sdk_version str

sdkVersion sent with quote/token requests; the API requires it to serve a valid response.

DEFAULT_SDK_VERSION timeout float

Per-request timeout in seconds.

DEFAULT_TIMEOUT max_retries int

Maximum number of 429 retries before raising :class:~mayan.exceptions.MayanRateLimitError.

DEFAULT_MAX_RETRIES http_client Optional[Client]

An existing httpx.Client to reuse. When provided it is used as-is for both hosts and conflicting base_url/ api_key/api_key_header are ignored (with a warning).

None

docs.title: get_quotes(*, from_token, from_chain, to_token, to_chain, amount=None, amount_base_units=None, slippage_bps='auto', referrer=None, referrer_bps=None, gas_drop=None, destination_address=None, swift=True, mctp=True, wormhole=True, fast_mctp=True, gasless=False, shuttle=False, extra_params=None)
docs.text:
Fetch every candidate cross-chain route (GET /v3/quote).

Returns all quotes Mayan can offer (one per enabled protocol) plus the minimum SDK version. Use :meth:get_quote for just the best one.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default from_token str

Source token address (SPL mint on Solana, contract on EVM/Sui; the zero address denotes native).

required from_chain str

Source chain name, e.g. solana or ethereum.

required to_token str

Destination token address.

required to_chain str

Destination chain name.

required amount Optional[str]

Amount to send in whole token units (e.g. "100" for 100 USDC). Mutually exclusive with amount_base_units.

None amount_base_units Optional[str]

Amount to send in the source token's smallest unit (e.g. "100000000"). Mutually exclusive with amount.

None slippage_bps Any

Slippage tolerance in basis points, or "auto" to let Mayan choose. Defaults to "auto".

'auto' referrer Optional[str]

Referrer address credited with referrer_bps fees.

None referrer_bps Optional[int]

Referrer fee in basis points.

None gas_drop Optional[float]

Native gas to drop to the recipient on the destination chain, in whole units.

None destination_address Optional[str]

Recipient address (defaults to the sender on the executing side).

None swift bool

Enable Swift (auction) routes.

True mctp bool

Enable MCTP (Circle CCTP) routes.

True wormhole bool

Enable Wormhole routes.

True fast_mctp bool

Enable fast-MCTP routes.

True gasless bool

Enable gasless routes.

False shuttle bool

Enable Shuttle routes.

False extra_params Optional[dict[str, Any]]

Additional raw query params to merge in (escape hatch for newer flags not yet modelled).

None

Returns:

Name Type Description A QuoteResponse

class:~mayan.QuoteResponse with the candidate quotes.

Raises:

Type Description ValueError

Neither amount nor amount_base_units was given.

MayanAPIError

The API rejected the request (e.g. 406 no route).

MayanRateLimitError

Rate limited after exhausting retries.

docs.title: get_quote(*, from_token, from_chain, to_token, to_chain, amount=None, amount_base_units=None, slippage_bps='auto', referrer=None, referrer_bps=None, gas_drop=None, destination_address=None, swift=True, mctp=True, wormhole=True, fast_mctp=True, gasless=False, shuttle=False, extra_params=None)
docs.text:
Get the single best cross-chain quote (the headline call).

Convenience wrapper over :meth:get_quotes that returns the first (best) candidate. See :meth:get_quotes for the full argument reference.

Returns:

Type Description Quote

The best :class:~mayan.Quote.

Raises:

Type Description ValueError

Neither amount nor amount_base_units was given.

MayanAPIError

The API rejected the request, or no route was found.

MayanRateLimitError

Rate limited after exhausting retries.

required

docs.title: poll_swap_status(*, tx_hash, interval=5.0, timeout=300.0, max_interval=30.0)
docs.text:
Poll a swap's status until it is terminal (completed or refunded).

Repeatedly calls :meth:get_swap_status, sleeping between attempts with the delay doubling from interval up to max_interval.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default tx_hash str

The source-chain transaction hash to track.

required interval float

Initial delay between polls, in seconds.

5.0 timeout float

Maximum total time to wait, in seconds.

300.0 max_interval float

Cap on the (exponentially growing) poll delay.

30.0

Returns:

Type Description SwapStatus

The terminal :class:~mayan.SwapStatus (completed or refunded).

Raises:

Type Description TimeoutError

No terminal state was reached within timeout.

MayanAPIError

A status request failed.

MayanRateLimitError

Rate limited after exhausting retries.

docs.title: MayanAPIError
docs.text:
Bases: MayanError

The API returned a non-2xx response (other than rate limiting).

A common case is HTTP 406 with {"code": "ROUTE_NOT_FOUND"} when no route exists for the requested swap; inspect :attr:response_body for the API's structured error.

Attributes:

Name Type Description status_code

The HTTP status code returned by the API.

response_body

The parsed JSON response body, or None if the body was empty or not valid JSON.

docs.title: __init__(message, *, status_code, response_body=None)
docs.text:
Initialize the error.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default message str

Human-readable error message (the API's message/msg field when available, otherwise a generated description).

required status_code int

The HTTP status code returned by the API.

required response_body Optional[Any]

The parsed JSON response body, if any.

None

docs.title: MayanError
docs.text:
Bases: Exception

Base class for all errors raised by this library.

Catch this to handle any mayan-py-originated failure regardless of kind. Note that low-level transport failures (timeouts, connection errors) propagate as the underlying :class:httpx.HTTPError subclasses, not as MayanError.

docs.title: MayanRateLimitError
docs.text:
Bases: MayanAPIError

HTTP 429: rate limit exceeded.

Raised once the client's retries are exhausted (see max_retries). The client retries 429s automatically before surfacing this.

Attributes:

Name Type Description retry_after

Seconds to wait before retrying, derived from the ratelimit-reset or retry-after response header, or None if neither was present.

status_code

Always 429.

response_body

The parsed JSON response body, if any.

docs.title: __init__(message, *, status_code=429, retry_after=None, response_body=None)
docs.text:
Initialize the error.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default message str

Human-readable error message.

required status_code int

The HTTP status code (defaults to 429).

429 retry_after Optional[float]

Seconds to wait before retrying, if the API advertised a reset window.

None response_body Optional[Any]

The parsed JSON response body, if any.

None

docs.title: Quote
docs.text:
Bases: _Model

A single cross-chain route returned inside a GET /v3/quote response.

Mayan returns several candidate quotes (one per protocol it can route through); :attr:type identifies the protocol, e.g. MCTP, SWIFT or WH (Wormhole). Amounts come in both human-readable (expected_amount_out) and raw smallest-unit (expected_amount_out_base_units) forms.

Many additional protocol-specific fields are present on the wire and remain accessible via attribute access thanks to extra="allow".

docs.title: QuoteResponse
docs.text:
Bases: _Model

The full body of GET /v3/quote: the candidate quotes plus metadata.

docs.title: SwapStatus
docs.text:
Bases: _Model

A swap/order as returned by the explorer API (GET /v3/swap/trx/{hash}).

:attr:status is the fine-grained protocol state (e.g. INITIATED_ON_EVM_MCTP, REDEEMED_ON_EVM_WITH_FEE, ORDER_SETTLED), while :attr:client_status is the coarse lifecycle state used for polling: INPROGRESS, COMPLETED or REFUNDED. Prefer the :attr:is_completed, :attr:is_refunded and :attr:is_terminal helpers over comparing strings.

The on-the-wire object carries dozens of protocol-specific fields; the ones not modelled here remain accessible via attribute access (extra="allow").

docs.title: is_completed property
docs.text: True when the swap completed successfully (clientStatus == COMPLETED).

docs.title: is_refunded property
docs.text: True when the swap was refunded (clientStatus == REFUNDED).

docs.title: is_terminal property
docs.text: True once the swap reached a final state (completed or refunded).

docs.title: Token
docs.text:
Bases: _Model

A token on one of Mayan's supported chains (Solana, EVM or Sui).

The same token is addressed differently per ecosystem: mint carries the Solana SPL mint while contract carries the EVM/Sui contract address (for Solana tokens the two coincide). chain_id is Mayan's internal numeric id and w_chain_id the corresponding Wormhole chain id.
